title: Transparent GUI and HUB (with White border)
description: The default gui and hub are replaced with a white border and transparent background
body:
# .........................................NOTE.........................................
- This texture pack supports minecraft **VERSION 1.21x ONLY**
- Versions below 1.21 will not work in some gui and hubs
(Because they have changed some texture locations and the gui itself)

- If you want this in a lower version, please let me know in the comments

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

# ..................................DESCRIPTION..................................
This is a texture pack that makes all the GUI (and HUD) in the game transparent so you can see ahead, and with a white outline so you can see where items should go.

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

# ..............................This mod includes..............................

**v1.2:**

**The default Minecraft hub, container**
- Change text field highlighted background color to transparent 
- Change bundle slot background to transparent
- Change bundle block slot to white
- Change page backward, forward button to default
- Change page backward, forward button highlighted to default

**v1.1:**

**The default Minecraft containers and container elements**
- Change Furnace color to white
- Change villager trades, job and level name color to white


**v1.0:**

**The default Minecraft element name color**
- Change name color to White 

**The default Minecraft advancements GUI and GUI elements**
- Tabs
- Widgets

**The default Minecraft containers and container elements**
- Creative inventory, item search tab, item tab, and the tabs themselves
- Anvils
- Beacons
- Blast furnace
- Brewing stands
- Cartography table
- Crafter
- Crafting tables
- Enchanting table
- Furnaces
- Grindstone
- Horse
- Inventory
- Loom
- Smithing table
- Smoker
- Stonecutter
- Villager interaction GUI's
- Hoppers
- Dispensers
- Droppers
- Barrel
- Chest
- Recipe backgrounds

**The default Minecraft gamemode switcher, hub, popup, recipe book, social interactions**
- Widgets
